---
title: "George Ralph Dundas"
---

## George Ralph Dundas

**Dates:** (1844-1869)

### Description

nephew of Anne Mackenzie, an invalid

### Biography

[LG 1952].

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Aug 12 [1867]
- Letter from 16 July [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
